report.summary: Cycle-close review: 771 published pages live, 6 API routes healthy with proper caching, build passes on Vercel (ignoreBuildErrors), 4 files with TS/JSX syntax errors flagged for cleanup, publish queue down to 2 remaining items.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Latest commit (e3f63fc): 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker — all page.tsx files verified present
Published pages audit: 771 page entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES, spot-checked 20 random pages — 19/20 exist
MISSING: /wallets/rainbow listed in PUBLISHED_PAGES but no page.tsx found — should be removed or scaffolded
TypeScript: 141 errors across 4 files (lido-v3 guide: 94, structured-data.examples.ts: 40, crypto-arbitrage guide: 4, rwa-yield guide: 3) — all unescaped > chars in JSX or wrong file extension
Build not blocked: ignoreBuildErrors: true means Vercel builds succeed, but these should be cleaned up

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes verified healthy: prices (60s TTL), defi-yields (300s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s)
External API URLs correct: CoinGecko /coins/markets, /global, /search/trending; Alternative.me /fng
Fallback data present on 5/6 routes — defi-yields missing explicit hardcoded fallback
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers on all routes; X-Cache-Source missing on defi-yields

sections.title: DevOps
items: Vercel: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, workerThreads: false, 8GB heap
Latest deploy e3f63fc successful with ignoreBuildErrors
Security headers configured: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, X-DNS-Prefetch

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Day 63 publish batch completed: 5 DeFi comparison/review pages promoted to production
Publish queue nearly drained: only 2 items remain (monad-guide, zora-attention-markets) — both blocked on missing page.tsx
Carry-over: (1) Fix 4 files with TS syntax errors, (2) scaffold or remove /wallets/rainbow, (3) scaffold monad + zora pages to clear queue
No blockers requiring Jefe's attention — cleanup and scaffolding only
